name: arifOS Observatory WebMCP Surface
description: Browser-native agent tool surface for arifOS Observatory, governed by arifOS constitutional floors F1-F13.

tools.name: get_federation_status
tools.description: Returns live health status of all arifOS federation organs (arifOS, GEOX, WEALTH, WELL, AAA)

tools.name: get_constitutional_floors
tools.description: Returns the arifOS constitutional floor definitions (F1-F13) — the governing law of the federation

tools.name: get_vault_status
tools.description: Returns VAULT999 status — immutable audit vault health and recent seals
